title: abutilon lepidum
intro: Abutilon lepidum, also known as Indian mallow or country mallow, is a plant species native to the Indian subcontinent and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, and is also believed to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects, potentially reducing stress and anxiety. Abutilon lepidum is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be found in some commercial herbal supplements and creams.
